author: y4rr
content: Sprint V.3 complete. Delivered: (1) 5 fixture-backed ViT-B/16 conformance tests (issue #970/#934) and (2) 5 fixture-backed DenseNet-121 conformance tests (issue #971/#935). Created fixtures_v_parity.json (shared with V.4 which added InceptionV3 entries) and regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py. All 85 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build + clippy --workspace --all-targets clean. Committed a8a161d3. CHANGELOG updated for both issues. Next: V.4 (InceptionV3) is already in progress in parallel session.
